news.title:
Paint makers like Berger Paints focus on industrial coatings as decorative competition rises.
Iran war raises crude costs, squeezing margins; firms seek growth beyond decorative paints.
news.summary:
Paint makers like Berger Paints focus on industrial coatings as decorative competition rises.
Iran war raises crude costs, squeezing margins; firms seek growth beyond decorative paints.

news.title:
Berger Paints' board to meet on May 12, 2026, to approve FY26 audited results.
Dividend recommendation for FY26 equity shares will also be considered at the meeting.
news.summary:
Berger Paints' board to meet on May 12, 2026, to approve FY26 audited results.
Dividend recommendation for FY26 equity shares will also be considered at the meeting.

news.title:
Berger Paints announced a 5-10% price hike effective April 9, following Asian Paints' 6-8% hike.
Rising crude-linked input costs drive hikes; sector faces margin pressures amid global energy volatility.
news.summary:
Berger Paints announced a 5-10% price hike effective April 9, following Asian Paints' 6-8% hike.
Rising crude-linked input costs drive hikes; sector faces margin pressures amid global energy volatility.

news.title:
FMCG firms face rising packaging costs due to higher crude oil prices and rupee depreciation.
Rationalising of commercial LPG impacts production in some sectors amid the West Asia conflict.
news.summary:
FMCG firms face rising packaging costs due to higher crude oil prices and rupee depreciation.
Rationalising of commercial LPG impacts production in some sectors amid the West Asia conflict.

news.title:
Berger Paints to hike mass premium & luxury product prices by up to 10% due to rising crude costs.
Competitors like Asian Paints & JSW Dulux also raise prices; dealers stock up, aiding short-term volumes.
news.summary:
Berger Paints to hike mass premium & luxury product prices by up to 10% due to rising crude costs.
Competitors like Asian Paints & JSW Dulux also raise prices; dealers stock up, aiding short-term volumes.

news.title:
Paint stocks face challenges from crude inflation, weak demand, and elevated competition, impacting margins and growth.
Asian Paints, Berger, and Kansai Nerolac shares fell over 20% in 2026; pricing remains a dilemma amid cost pressures.
news.summary:
Paint stocks face challenges from crude inflation, weak demand, and elevated competition, impacting margins and growth.
Asian Paints, Berger, and Kansai Nerolac shares fell over 20% in 2026; pricing remains a dilemma amid cost pressures.

news.title:
Paint stocks like Asian Paints, Berger Paints fell amid crude oil surge to $120.
Rising oil prices increase input costs, pressure margins, affecting investor sentiment.
news.summary:
Paint stocks like Asian Paints, Berger Paints fell amid crude oil surge to $120.
Rising oil prices increase input costs, pressure margins, affecting investor sentiment.

news.title:
Paintmakers foresee intense competition, pricing pressures but expect Q4 demand recovery with volume growth.
Leading manufacturers like Asian Paints, Berger Paints, Kansai Nerolac aim to sustain margins amid challenges.
news.summary:
Paintmakers foresee intense competition, pricing pressures but expect Q4 demand recovery with volume growth.
Leading manufacturers like Asian Paints, Berger Paints, Kansai Nerolac aim to sustain margins amid challenges.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley sees multi-year de-rating in paint stocks like Asian Paints, Berger Paints, and Kansai Nerolac.
Target prices suggest downsides of 11% for Asian Paints, 17.6% for Berger, and 7.5% for Kansai Nerolac.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley sees multi-year de-rating in paint stocks like Asian Paints, Berger Paints, and Kansai Nerolac.
Target prices suggest downsides of 11% for Asian Paints, 17.6% for Berger, and 7.5% for Kansai Nerolac.

news.title:
Berger Paints saw an NSE block trade of ~729,760 shares worth Rs. 33.8 Cr.
The trade was executed at Rs. 463.05 per share.
news.summary:
Berger Paints saw an NSE block trade of ~729,760 shares worth Rs. 33.8 Cr.
The trade was executed at Rs. 463.05 per share.

news.title:
Berger Paints India's quality grade downgraded from excellent to good due to fundamental shifts.
Key metrics like ROE, ROCE, debt levels, and growth consistency were analyzed for this downgrade.
news.summary:
Berger Paints India's quality grade downgraded from excellent to good due to fundamental shifts.
Key metrics like ROE, ROCE, debt levels, and growth consistency were analyzed for this downgrade.

news.title:
Berger Paints plans Rs. 1,800-2,000 Cr investment for new facilities.
The company targets double-digit volume growth in FY26.
news.summary:
Berger Paints plans Rs. 1,800-2,000 Cr investment for new facilities.
The company targets double-digit volume growth in FY26.

news.title:
Nomura gives Berger Paints a buy rating with a target price of ₹625, anticipating recovery from Q4.
The stock trades one standard deviation below its 10-year average; competitive pressure remains a risk.
news.summary:
Nomura gives Berger Paints a buy rating with a target price of ₹625, anticipating recovery from Q4.
The stock trades one standard deviation below its 10-year average; competitive pressure remains a risk.

news.title:
Berger Paints shared Q3 and 9M FY25 investor presentation audio, detailing financial results.
The audio is available on the company's website, affirming regulatory compliance.
news.summary:
Berger Paints shared Q3 and 9M FY25 investor presentation audio, detailing financial results.

news.title: Berger Paints misses Q3 estimates due to extended monsoon and shorter festive season.
news.summary: Berger Paints misses Q3 estimates due to extended monsoon and shorter festive season.

news.title:
Berger Paints saw high single-digit volume growth in Q3 FY26 with muted value growth.
Gross margin improved YoY and QoQ; PBDIT margin within guidance, but protective segment weak.
news.summary:
Berger Paints saw high single-digit volume growth in Q3 FY26 with muted value growth.
Gross margin improved YoY and QoQ; PBDIT margin within guidance, but protective segment weak.

news.title:
Berger Paints India Ltd reported Q3 FY25 unaudited standalone revenue at ₹2,700.7 crore, up from ₹2,653.8 crore YoY.
Consolidated net profit for Q3 FY25 stood at ₹271.3 crore, reflecting robust operational performance.
news.summary:
Berger Paints India Ltd reported Q3 FY25 unaudited standalone revenue at ₹2,700.7 crore, up from ₹2,653.8 crore YoY.
Consolidated net profit for Q3 FY25 stood at ₹271.3 crore, reflecting robust operational performance.

news.title:
Berger Paints India starts production at Hindupur facility to cut costs.
The new site is aimed at enhancing operational efficiency for the company.
news.summary:
Berger Paints India starts production at Hindupur facility to cut costs.
The new site is aimed at enhancing operational efficiency for the company.

news.title:
Berger Paints India Ltd announces a conference call on Feb 5, 2026, to discuss Q3FY26 results.
Key participants include MD & CEO Abhijit Roy and CFO Kaushik Ghosh; details shared by Emkay Global.
news.summary:
